summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SignalAI after Check This URL fix. All major features working perfectly - backend APIs at 96% success rate, frontend fully functional with excellent navigation and UI. The Check This URL analyzer now works correctly with real URLs including the Wikipedia test case.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Still returns 400 error for example.com test URL in automated tests
flaky_endpoints.impact: Minor - real URLs like Wikipedia work perfectly

passed_tests: Homepage loads with SignalAI branding and Check This input
Check This URL analyzer works perfectly with Wikipedia URL
AI News Feed displays 10 articles with hype scores and summaries
Hype filter tabs work (All, Low Hype, Opinion, High Hype)
Prediction Graveyard page loads with 3 predictions and filter tabs
Daily Digest page shows 2 low-hype articles
Navigation between all pages works seamlessly
Stats sidebar shows article counts (10) and prediction counts (2)
Backend API endpoints (24/25 tests passed - 96% success rate)
URL analysis returns detailed hype scores, summaries, and claims
